parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory

participant AudioFileHeader
participant AudioFileHeader_accessory
participant AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter

autonumber

AudioFileHeader -> AudioFileHeader_accessory : audio id
AudioFileHeader_accessory -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter : audio id
AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter : edit sample and delete sample\ndialogs as render functions

opt if route is "Quick Save"
    AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter : assign sample dialog as render functions
end

AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory : list of render functions
AudioFileHeader_accessory -> AudioFileHeader_accessory : render drop-down menu\nand dialog render functions\nin render()

@enduml
```
